name: outpost_arn
description: The ARN of the Outpost the instance is assigned to

name: password_data
description: Base-64 encoded encrypted password data for the instance. Useful for getting the administrator password for instances running Microsoft Windows. This attribute is only exported if `get_password_data` is true

name: public_ip
description: The public IP address assigned to the instance, if applicable.

name: ipv6_addresses
description: The IPv6 address assigned to the instance, if applicable

name: tags_all
description: A map of tags assigned to the resource, including those inherited from the provider default_tags configuration block

name: security_group_arn
description: Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the security group

name: id
description: The ID of the instance

name: arn
description: The ARN of the instance

name: capacity_reservation_specification
description: Capacity reservation specification of the instance

name: public_dns
description: The public DNS name assigned to the instance. For EC2-VPC, this is only available if you've enabled DNS hostnames for your VPC

name: spot_request_state
description: The current request state of the Spot Instance Request

name: private_ip
description: The private IP address assigned to the instance

name: ami
description: AMI ID that was used to create the instance

name: iam_role_unique_id
description: Stable and unique string identifying the IAM role

name: iam_instance_profile_unique
description: Stable and unique string identifying the IAM instance profile

name: primary_network_interface_id
description: The ID of the instance's primary network interface

name: private_dns
description: The private DNS name assigned to the instance. Can only be used inside the Amazon EC2, and only available if you've enabled DNS hostnames for your VPC

name: availability_zone
description: The availability zone of the created instance

name: iam_role_arn
description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) specifying the IAM role

name: root_block_device
description: Root block device information

name: ebs_block_device
description: EBS block device information

name: security_group_id
description: ID of the security group

name: instance_state
description: The state of the instance

name: spot_instance_id
description: The Instance ID (if any) that is currently fulfilling the Spot Instance request

name: ebs_volumes
description: Map of EBS volumes created and their attributes

name: iam_role_name
description: The name of the IAM role

name: iam_instance_profile_arn
description: ARN assigned by AWS to the instance profile

name: iam_instance_profile_id
description: Instance profile's ID

name: spot_bid_status
description: The current bid status of the Spot Instance Request

name: ephemeral_block_device
description: Ephemeral block device information
